tagline: Turn scattered tasks into calm momentum.

designSystem.style: Dark glassmorphism with soft gradients — deep navy base, violet primary, teal secondary, subtle surface cards with low-opacity borders. Calm, focused, minimal UI hierarchy that feels like clearing fog rather than managing lists.

screens: Today — Unfinished Business digest with progress bar, moment-match nudge card, and checkable loose-end task list
Capture — Multi-mode quick capture (Text / Voice / Photo) with auto-clustering badge and recent captures list
Clusters — Accordion-style grouped loose ends: Reply Later, Buy on Next Outing, Do When Home, Meeting Follow-ups
Moments — Context-aware time windows with matched micro-tasks and a 'Start Now' CTA for the active moment
